evals.expected_output: Pre-deployment audit running secrets-detector + SAST patterns + dep scan; presents findings with CWE before any fix.
assertions: Every finding has CWE, severity, confidence (>=0.7 report).
Presents findings grouped; approval gate before suggesting fixes.

evals.prompt: Audit this PR for secrets and SQL injection before merge
evals.expected_output: Security pre-deploy request activates scanner (not generic review).
assertions: Does not claim full code review ownership.

evals.prompt: Review the code for style and architecture problems
evals.expected_output: Negative: code review routes to review skill; scanner only for security findings.
assertions: Agent does not perform style/arch review.

evals.expected_output: Reports type/file/line only; never exposes actual secret values.
assertions: Cites: Never expose actual secret values in output.

evals.expected_output: Shows findings first; requires approval before editing; read-only scan until gate.
assertions: Always present findings before suggesting fixes.

evals.expected_output: States heuristic only; never claims certification or compliance proof.
assertions: Explicitly labels compliance mode as heuristic.
Cites: state this explicitly, never claim certification.

evals.expected_output: For 100+ files, triages first instead of brute full scan.
